items.heading_en: Deep Research Engineer, NewPraya AI Limited, Hong Kong
items.heading_zh: 深度研究工程师，NewPraya AI Limited，香港
bullets_en: Prototype development and testing of full-link medical workflows.
Implementation of medical OCR and medical auditing systems.
Development of Clinical Decision Support Systems (CDSS) and other medical AI solutions.
bullets_zh: 负责全链路医疗流程原型开发与测试。
实现医疗 OCR 与医疗审核系统。
开发临床辅助决策系统 (CDSS) 及其他医疗 AI 方案。

items.heading_en: Developer, FridayDoc - Modular AI Research Assistant Framework, Group Project
items.heading_zh: 开发者，FridayDoc - 模块化 AI 研究助手框架（团队项目）
bullets_en: Developed a modular AI research assistant framework enhancing OS-Copilot with script-based architecture.
Implemented platform integrations for Hugging Face, GitHub, and X for automated data retrieval.
Designed content filtering system and dynamic tool selection to improve prompt quality and task decomposition.
bullets_zh: 开发基于脚本架构的模块化 AI 研究助手框架，增强 OS-Copilot 功能。
实现 Hugging Face、GitHub 与 X 平台集成，支持自动化数据检索。
设计内容过滤与动态工具选择机制，提升提示质量与任务分解效果。

items.heading_en: Senior Design Project - Explainable ML Algorithm and Hardware for Surgical Robot
items.heading_zh: 毕业设计 - 可解释机器学习算法与外科机器人硬件
bullets_en: Developed an efficient AI segmentation method for breast tumors with focus on interpretability.
Implemented Attention UNet for accurate segmentation under computational constraints.
Handled data preprocessing, model training, and evaluation.
bullets_zh: 开发兼顾可解释性的乳腺肿瘤高效分割方案。
在算力受限场景实现 Attention UNet 并提升分割精度。
完成数据预处理、模型训练与评估。

bullets_en: Architected and implemented an ECS with archetype-based entity management for high performance.
Designed efficient query and iteration mechanisms optimized for cache performance.
bullets_zh: 架构并实现基于原型管理的高性能 ECS 系统。
设计高效查询与迭代机制并优化缓存性能。
